ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "original_title" TEXT /* Original title of the film */,
  "budget" REAL /* Production budget of the film */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the film */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the film */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the film */,
  "title" TEXT /* Theatrical title of the film */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average vote score from users */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Total number of votes received */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Brief overview of the film's plot */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline for the film */,
  "uid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for external data service */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director of the film */,
  "production_company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production company */,
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the distributor */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the film was produced */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the film */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Age certification (e.g., PG-13, R) */,
  "runtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the film in minutes */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of film production */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* End date of film production */,
  "marketing_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for marketing */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the film's poster */,
  "trailer_count" INTEGER /* Number of trailers available for the film */,
  "is_3d" INTEGER /* Indicates if the film is available in 3D */,
  "is_imax" INTEGER /* Indicates if the film is available in IMAX */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_distributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("distributor_id") REFERENCES distributors ("distributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_production_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_company_id") REFERENCES production_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birth date of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the director's profile or biography */,
  "awards_count" INTEGER /* Number of awards won by the director */,
  "notable_films" TEXT /* List of notable films directed by the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Action, Comedy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_genre" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "spoiler" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review contains spoilers */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., Rotten Tomatoes, IMDb) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* User's role (e.g., admin, regular user) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "box_office" (
  "box_office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each box office record */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the revenue record */,
  "daily_revenue" REAL /* Daily revenue generated by the film */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the box office revenue was recorded */,
  "audience_count" INTEGER /* Number of audience members */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("box_office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_box_office_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film that won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., Oscar, Golden Globe) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., Best Director, Best Actor) */,
  "ceremony" TEXT /* Name of the award ceremony (e.g., Oscars, Cannes Film Festival) */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Additional details about the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_cast" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast record */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  "character_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the character */,
  "actor_profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the actor's profile or biography */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_cast_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_trailers" (
  "trailer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trailer */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the trailer video */,
  "trailer_type" TEXT /* Type of trailer (e.g., teaser, official) */,
  "trailer_release_date" TEXT /* Date the trailer was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trailer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_trailers_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_statistics" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the film from all reviews */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews received by the film */,
  "total_box_office_revenue" REAL /* Total box office revenue for the film */,
  "average_daily_revenue" REAL /* Average daily revenue for the film */,
  "highest_daily_revenue" REAL /* Highest daily revenue recorded for the film */,
  "lowest_daily_revenue" REAL /* Lowest daily revenue recorded for the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_durations" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the film in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distributors" (
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distributor */,
  "distributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the distributor */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the distributor was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the distributor's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the distributor's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distributor_id")
)
